data.body: Investigation complete: bug is already fixed by b9a9-4cb3 (global marker scan fallback in find_global_red_marker_for_test). Behavioral test confirms the fix: when test file is staged but source doesn't exist, find_global_red_marker_for_test correctly finds the RED marker and tolerates the failure. Added regression test tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-staged-test-no-source.sh to prevent future regression.
